recommendations.title: Breaking Surface
recommendations.overview: Two Swedish/Norwegian half sisters go on a winter diving trip in Northern Norway, when they get trapped after a rockslide.

recommendations.title: 47 Meters Down
recommendations.overview: Two sisters on Mexican vacation are trapped in a shark observation cage at the bottom of the ocean, with oxygen running low and great whites circling nearby, they have less than an hour of air left to figure out how to get to the surface.

recommendations.title: Barbie in the 12 Dancing Princesses

recommendations.title: The Deep House

recommendations.title: 12 Feet Deep
recommendations.overview: Two sisters are trapped under the fiberglass cover of an Olympic sized public pool and must brave the cold and each other to survive the harrowing night.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Black Water: Abyss

recommendations.title: Pushing Tin
recommendations.overview: Two air traffic controllers who thrive on living dangerously compete to outdo each other on several levels.

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in the Great Puppy Adventure
